title: OpenAI's Plan To Merge Chat And Agents — With Greg Brockman
summary: Greg Brockman, OpenAI president and co-founder, discusses OpenAI's vision to merge chat and agent interfaces into persistent agents. He argues that compute is the scarce resource determining the AI race, predicts pricing evolution as intelligence commoditizes, and sees major potential in healthcare applications.
writeup: In this interview, OpenAI president and co-founder Greg Brockman lays out a plan to merge chat and agent interfaces into persistent agents. Brockman frames compute as the scarce resource that will determine the outcome of the AI race, and he predicts that pricing will shift as intelligence becomes commoditized. He also points to healthcare as an area with major application potential.
